name: tool-lightvoss_5433-ppt-engine-6443rj2a
description: Anna Executa plugin for Presenton template discovery, manifest-based deck HTML generation, deck HTML to PPTX model conversion, and stability validation.
author: Anna Developer

tools.name: app_list_workspaces
tools.description: Scan the default PPT task workspace root and return existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspaces.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_defaults
tools.description: Read global PPT workspace defaults used by newly created workspaces without creating a workspace.

tools.name: app_create_workspace
tools.description: Create a new PPT task workspace under the default workspace root and initialize core JSON files.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional project title. Defaults to the generated workspace id.

tools.name: app_open_workspace
tools.description: Open an existing PPT task workspace and initialize any missing core JSON files.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_settings
tools.description: Update the PPT workspace-level setting.json and return the refreshed task workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: setting
parameters.description: Partial settings object to merge into the workspace-level setting.json.

parameters.name: persist_as_default
parameters.description: When true, also merge these settings into the global PPT defaults used by newly created workspaces.

tools.name: app_append_workspace_log
tools.description: Append one JSONL log entry under an existing PPT task workspace .log directory.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Workspace log channel. Supports ai-outline, ai-outline-interactions, ai-page-plan, ai-page-plan-interactions, ai-page-agent, ai-page-agent-interactions, and ai-page-agent-stream.

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: JSON-serializable log entry to append.

parameters.name: payload_keys
parameters.description: Optional entry keys that may be moved to sidecar payload files when they exceed the inline payload threshold.

parameters.name: inline_payload_max_bytes
parameters.description: Optional max UTF-8 byte size before a payload key is moved to a sidecar file.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_outline
tools.description: Read and normalize outline.json for an existing PPT task workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_outline
tools.description: Write outline.json for an existing PPT task workspace and return the refreshed workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: outline
parameters.description: Outline artifact with title, items, source, status, and updated_at fields.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_pages
tools.description: Reorder, rename, or delete rendered workspace pages and sync the selected template manifest.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Ordered list of remaining pages. Each entry must include page_id and may include title.

tools.name: app_duplicate_workspace_page
tools.description: Duplicate one rendered workspace page and sync the selected template manifest plus workspace state files.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Manifest slide id to duplicate.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional title for the duplicated slide.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_title
tools.description: Update task.json title for an existing PPT task workspace and return the refreshed workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: New workspace title.

tools.name: app_list_template_groups
tools.description: List builtin PPT template groups with static preview metadata for the app template picker.

tools.name: app_get_template_group
tools.description: Return one builtin PPT template group with layout details for the app template picker.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id, such as red-finance-v3.

tools.name: app_get_template_preview
tools.description: Return one static template preview image as a data URL.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id.

parameters.name: layout_id
parameters.description: Optional full layout id. Defaults to the group's primary preview.

tools.name: app_select_workspace_template
tools.description: Select a template group for an app workspace and fork it into workspace/template.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: template_group
parameters.description: Builtin template group id to fork into the workspace template directory.

tools.name: app_get_template_planning_context
tools.description: Return the selected workspace template catalog subset used by LLM page planning.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_page_plan
tools.description: Validate and write page-plan.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_plan
parameters.description: LLM-generated page plan.

tools.name: app_get_page_plan
tools.description: Read page-plan.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_page_files
tools.description: Prepare template/slides, template/data, manifest.json, and page-progress.json from page-plan.json.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_page_progress
tools.description: Read page-progress.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_page_progress
tools.description: Patch one page entry in page-progress.json.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page id from page-plan.json.

parameters.name: patch
parameters.description: Partial progress fields to merge into the page entry.

tools.name: app_render_workspace_page_preview
tools.description: Render one workspace manifest page to lightweight HTML and PNG preview for Agent review.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: Zero-based page index to render.

tools.name: app_render_deck_html
tools.description: Render the selected workspace template manifest to reviewable deck HTML and return a local preview URL.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_export_model
tools.description: Build the final export deck HTML for the workspace and convert it into a PPTX model JSON file.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_start_pptx_export_model
tools.description: Start preparing the PPTX export HTML and model in the background, writing progress to output/generate_ppt.json.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_pptx_export_status
tools.description: Read output/generate_ppt.json for the current PPTX export job status.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_export_artifact_download_url
tools.description: Register a recorded PPTX or PDF export artifact on the local download server and return a temporary HTTP download URL.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: artifact_type
parameters.description: Export artifact type. Supports pptx and pdf.

tools.name: app_export_pdf
tools.description: Render the workspace deck into a share-ready PDF file.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_pptx_export
tools.description: Record the generated PPTX export path in the workspace artifacts.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pptx_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the generated PPTX file.

parameters.name: generator_result
parameters.description: Optional raw generator result to store with the export record.

tools.name: app_record_pdf_export
tools.description: Record the generated PDF export path in the workspace artifacts.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pdf_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the generated PDF file.

tools.name: listDiscoveredTemplateGroupSummaries
tools.description: List discovered template group summaries from builtin and optional local template roots.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: getAllDiscoveredTemplateGroups
tools.description: Return all discovered template groups with full layout details from builtin and optional local roots.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: getDiscoveredTemplateGroup
tools.description: Return one discovered template group with layouts from builtin and optional local roots.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id to look up.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: buildDeckHtmlFromManifest
tools.description: Build a deck viewer HTML and one rendered PNG image per slide from a manifest JSON file, write them to an output directory, and return the generated file paths.

parameters.name: manifest_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a manifest JSON file.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Absolute directory where the generated deck HTML and per-slide PNG images should be written.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional base name for generated files. Defaults to manifest.title after filename sanitization.

parameters.name: single_page
parameters.description: Whether to generate only one slide PNG image. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number to generate when single_page is true.

tools.name: validateDeckFromManifest
tools.description: Run static and optional rendered stability validation on a manifest deck and return structured diagnostics.

parameters.name: manifest_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a manifest JSON file.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Absolute output directory used for generated validation artifacts when rendered checks need to build deck HTML.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional presentation name forwarded to the validation engine.

parameters.name: single_page
parameters.description: Whether to validate only one slide from the manifest. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number to validate when single_page is true.

parameters.name: include_rendered_checks
parameters.description: Whether to run browser-based rendered validation. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: deck_html_path
parameters.description: Optional absolute prebuilt deck HTML path to reuse instead of rebuilding during rendered validation.

tools.name: convertDeckHtmlToPptxModel
tools.description: Convert a rendered deck HTML file into a PptxPresentationModel JSON file and return the output path.

parameters.name: html_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the rendered deck HTML file to convert.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Absolute path where the generated PPTX model JSON file should be written.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional presentation name to store in the generated model.

parameters.name: settle_time_ms
parameters.description: Optional delay after render-ready before DOM extraction.

parameters.name: screenshots_dir
parameters.description: Optional absolute directory for screenshot fallback assets used during extraction.

tools.name: forkTemplateGroup
tools.description: Fork a builtin template group into a target local directory with TSX slides, group.json, manifest.json, catalog.json, and data assets.

parameters.name: template_group
parameters.description: Builtin template group id to fork, such as general or red-finance.

parameters.name: out_dir
parameters.description: Absolute target directory for the forked template group.

parameters.name: manifest_title
parameters.description: Optional title to write into the generated manifest.json.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Whether to replace a non-empty output directory. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

tools.name: create_task_project
tools.description: Create a new task project and initialize task-state files.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional project title.

parameters.name: initial_request
parameters.description: Optional seed request.

tools.name: open_task_project
tools.description: Open an existing task project and read current task-state data.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

tools.name: query_task_state
tools.description: Query current state, generate promote guidance docs, and return the recommended next action.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: response_mode
parameters.description: compact or full. Defaults to compact for PPT AI Agent context efficiency.

tools.name: record_requirements
tools.description: Persist user requirements.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: merge or replace_all. Defaults to merge.

parameters.name: requirements
parameters.description: Requirements payload. Partial payloads are allowed in merge mode.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the requirements.

tools.name: record_template_selection
tools.description: Record the user-confirmed template group, fork it into project template/, and advance to project_forked.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: template_group
parameters.description: Selected template group id from listDiscoveredTemplateGroupSummaries.

parameters.name: selection_reason
parameters.description: Why the template group was selected.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the selection. Defaults to user.

tools.name: record_outline
tools.description: Persist the content outline.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: outline
parameters.description: Outline payload.

tools.name: record_page_plan
tools.description: Persist or patch the page plan.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: replace_all or update_page.

parameters.name: page_plan
parameters.description: Page plan payload.

tools.description: Select a page and begin page-level authoring.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Target page id.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Optional page number.

tools.name: record_page_progress
tools.description: Persist one page progress state transition.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.name: project_dir
parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Target page id.

parameters.name: page_state
parameters.description: Page state.

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Progress summary.

parameters.name: review_notes
parameters.description: Review notes.

tools.description: Record deck HTML review feedback, unlock requested pages, and return to the first page fix flow.

parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used for file transport output.

parameters.description: Absolute project directory.

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Pages to revise. Each item accepts page_id, summary, and review_notes.
